design_patterns/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler plugin configuration to use the 'release' flag for Java 21 instead of separate source and target flags for Java 8.
design_patterns/pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' flags with value '1.8' are incompatible with compiling code intended for Java 21 features and may cause compilation errors or missing API access when targeting a newer JDK.
